example_002.prompt: How do you switch to dark mode in Win 10?
example_002.response_reference:
There are two options.  You can either use the command line like this:

gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.interface dark-mode active

Or if you’d like to just do it for the current session you can use the keyboard shortcut “windows + shift + d”.

example_016.prompt: What part of the world did the potato originate in?

Some archeologists have suggested that the potato was introduced into the area by the Quechua people from the Andes, who may have carried the new seed on their raft when they migrated north. Others believe the potato was introduced to South America from the Mesoamerican area. The potato is a member of the nightshade family, and several plants and animals in this family were introduced into South America. One of these animals, the guinea pig, is believed to have traveled with the people.
